name: Entity Effect
desc: Applies a status/potion effect to an entity.

modules.name: PotionHUD
modules.purpose: Detect potion effects applied to entities. PotionHUD shows active effects. AntiPotion cancels negative effects.

modules.name: AntiPotion
modules.purpose: Detect potion effects applied to entities. PotionHUD shows active effects. AntiPotion cancels negative effects.
